dct_title_s: New York City Crimes by Precinct, 2010
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of City Planning
dct_description_sm: New York City Crimes by Precinct, 2010 is a polygon theme representing police precincts in New York City in 2010. Attribute information includes totals of felony, misdemeanor and violation incidents for 2010 calendar year. This dataset was derived from NYPD provided tables downloaded from the web site at: https://www.nyc.gov/site/nypd/stats/crime-statistics/historical.page in September 2023. The precinct boundaries are version 12c (the last version of the boundaries before precinct 121 was created in 2013) from New York City Planning as found on this web site: https://www.nyc.gov/site/planning/data-maps/open-data/bytes-archive.page in September 2023. Columbia Libraries staff appended the crime statistics to the precinct boundaries and has provided the data in the geopackage format. A codebook and has been included in the download package.
